dimensions.label: Dialogue Faithfulness
dimensions.description: The note must remain grounded in the dialogue.

dimensions.label: Clinical Completeness
dimensions.description: The note should capture salient clinical content from the encounter.

dimensions.label: Documentation Structure
dimensions.description: The note should respect the expected section scaffold for its note family.

criterion_templates.label: No Unsupported High-Risk Inferences
criterion_templates.description: Do not introduce catastrophic-risk conditions or unsupported specifics absent from the encounter narrative.

criterion_templates.label: No Unsupported Diagnostic Certainty
criterion_templates.description: Avoid definitive diagnostic language for entities not clearly supported by dialogue, exam, or reviewed results as discussed.

criterion_templates.label: Required Sections for Note Family
criterion_templates.description: Include the section headings expected for this note family when applicable.

criterion_templates.label: Chief Complaint / Presenting Symptom Alignment
criterion_templates.description: Reflect the presenting problem described in the visit when one is extractable.

criterion_templates.label: Salient Symptom Attributes
criterion_templates.description: Capture location, severity, duration, or trigger/pattern when discussed.

criterion_templates.label: Associated Symptom or Relevant Negative
criterion_templates.description: When the dialogue documents an associated symptom or a pertinent negative, mirror it.

criterion_templates.label: Discussed Study or Result Presence
criterion_templates.description: When imaging or labs are reviewed in the visit, document them in the note.

error_taxonomy.label: Unsupported Inference
error_taxonomy.description: The note adds a conclusion not grounded in the evidence.

error_taxonomy.label: Certainty Inflation
error_taxonomy.description: Definitive language without matching encounter support.

error_taxonomy.label: Omission
error_taxonomy.description: Clinically relevant dialogue content missing from the note.

error_taxonomy.label: Section Missing
error_taxonomy.description: Expected documentation section not clearly present.
